subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ayn! Hearken unto that wherewith the Wronged One maketh mention of thee, then render thanks unto thy Lord at eventide and at dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل عین ان استمع ما یذکرک به المظلوم ثم اشکر ربک فی العشی و الاشراق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
